query: 2026 Florida Republican gubernatorial primary status: Byron Donalds candidacy, opponents, Trump endorsement, polling, competitors dropping out. Who is running against Donalds and what are the polls showing as of mid-2026?
answer:
I've completed my research on the 2026 Florida Republican gubernatorial primary. Here's the summary:

**Byron Donalds is the overwhelming frontrunner** heading into the August 18, 2026 primary:
- **Trump-endorsed** since February 2025 (Truth Social endorsement preceded his announcement)
- **Leads by 39–46 points** in every 2026 poll (54% in June AIF and May Fabrizio Lee surveys)
- **~96% on Polymarket** to win the nomination
- **Raised $40M+** since February 2025

**Opponents running against Donalds (all on-ballot, all single digits):**
- **Lt. Gov. Jay Collins** (5–7%)
- **James Fishback** — investment CEO (8–9%)
- **Paul Renner** — former House Speaker (2%)

**On dropouts/non-entries:**
- **No major candidate has formally dropped out.** Jay Collins repeatedly and forcefully denied fall-2025 rumors he'd exit and remains in.
- **Casey DeSantis considered but did not enter** (appears only in hypothetical polls, where Donalds still crushes her ~44–7).
- **Ron DeSantis** is term-limited.
- Notable intra-party friction: Collins filed a legal challenge to Fishback's residency eligibility (hearing set for July 21, 2026), and there's controversy over party debate rules.

Full findings with all polling numbers, dates, and sources have been submitted via the structured output.

sources.title: Florida gubernatorial and lieutenant gubernatorial election, 2026
sources.snippet: Declared GOP candidates: Jay Collins, Byron Donalds, James Fishback, Paul Renner. Primary Aug 18, 2026; filing deadline June 12, 2026. Trump endorsed Donalds on Truth Social.

sources.snippet: Donalds 46%, Collins 4%, Fishback 4%, 39% undecided. With Casey DeSantis: Donalds 44% vs DeSantis 7%.

sources.snippet: Donalds 54%, Fishback 9%, Collins 7%, Renner 2%, undecided 28%. MoE 4.79%.

sources.snippet: Change Research poll (May 13-16, 2026): Donalds leads GOP primary by 39 points.

key_facts: Byron Donalds (U.S. Rep., FL-19) is the overwhelming frontrunner in the 2026 FL GOP gubernatorial primary, endorsed by President Trump on Truth Social in Feb 2025.
The GOP primary is August 18, 2026; qualifying/filing deadline was June 12, 2026; general election November 3, 2026.
Confirmed on-ballot GOP candidates: Byron Donalds, Lt. Gov. Jay Collins, former House Speaker Paul Renner, and businessman James Fishback.
Casey DeSantis considered a run but did NOT enter; she appears only in hypothetical polls (Donalds ~44% vs her 7%).
Ron DeSantis is term-limited and not running.
No major Republican has formally dropped out; Jay Collins forcefully denied fall-2025 dropout rumors ('100% bullshit') and remains in the race.
Jay Collins filed a legal challenge to James Fishback's eligibility over Florida residency requirements; a two-day hearing was set to begin July 21, 2026.
Donalds reported raising over $40 million since February 2025, ~2.5x DeSantis's candidate haul in the prior open primary.
Donalds leads by 39-46 points across all 2026 polling; competitors remain in single digits.
Polymarket priced Donalds at ~96% to win the GOP nomination (stable July 1-8, 2026).
The Florida governor race is rated Solid/Safe Republican by Cook, Inside Elections, and Sabato.

data_points.metric: Donalds Polymarket probability to win GOP nomination
